version_description: This tab is based on the studio recording: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PTxQ601mlAY.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

||: [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] ||  x3

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                              [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 Is there nothing I can say? Nothing I can do?[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                          [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 Change your mind, I'm so in love with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 Too deep in, you can't get out[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                             [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 You're just a poor girl in a rich man's house[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 Ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh-ooh-ooh[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                  [ch]F/E[/ch]
 Ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh-ooh-ooh[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]         N.C.   [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 Yeah, baby, I'm crying over you[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                                  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 Don't you know promises were never meant to keep?[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                           [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 Just like the night, dissolve off in sleep[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                        [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 I'll be your savior, steadfast and true[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 I'll come to your emotional rescue[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 I'll come to your emotional rescue[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 Ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh-ooh-ooh[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                  [ch]F/E[/ch]
 Ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh-ooh-ooh[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
 Yeah, the other night, crying[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
 Crying, baby, yeah, I'm crying[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Yeah, I'm like a child, baby[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]
I'm like a child, baby[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
Like a child[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                                                         [ch]D[/ch]  N.C.  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Yes, I'm like a child, like a child, like a child, like a child   (Woo)[/tab]


[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                        [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 You think you're one of a special breed[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                       [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 You think that you're his pet Pekingese[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                        [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 I'll be your savior, steadfast and true[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
 I'll come to your emotional rescue[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
 I'll come to your emotional rescue[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 Ah-ah, ah-ah, ah-ah-ah-ah[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                          [ch]F/E[/ch]
 Ah-ah, ah-ah, ah-ah-ah-ah[/tab]


[Verse 5]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
 Yeah, I was dreaming last night, babe[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Last night, I was dreaming[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
How you'd be mine, but I was crying[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Like a child, yeah, I was crying[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
Crying like a child[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]                                 [ch]D[/ch]
You will be mine, mine, mine, mine, mine, all mine[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]
You could be mine, could be mine[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]    N.C.  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Could be mine, all mine[/tab]


[Verse 6]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                      [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 I come to you, so silent in the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                             [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 So stealthy, so animal quiet[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                        [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                   [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                          [ch]F/E[/ch]
 Ah-ah, ah-ah, ah-ah-ah-ah[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]         N.C.  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah, you should be mine, mine, oh[/tab]


[Verse 7]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
 Yes, you could be mine[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
 Tonight   and every night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
 I will be your knight in shining armor[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Coming to your emotional rescue[/tab]
